/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_profiles_only.dir/unity/unity.c.o CMakeFiles/test_profiles_only.dir/test_main_profiles.c.o CMakeFiles/test_profiles_only.dir/test_profiles.c.o CMakeFiles/test_profiles_only.dir/Users/bennet/Desktop/temper/firmware/components/control/profiles.c.o -o test_profiles_only  -lm
